claimText: • Contract Labour: Norms apply to contractors with 50+ workers (earlier 20), and employers are allowed to engage contract labour even in defined core activities such as sanitation, subject to conditions.
evidenceExcerpt: • Contract Labour: Norms apply to contractors with 50+ workers (earlier 20), and employers are allowed to engage contract labour even in defined core activities such as sanitation, subject to conditions.

claimText: • Working Hours: Working hours capped at 8 hrs in a day & 48 hrs a week.
evidenceExcerpt: • Working Hours: Working hours capped at 8 hrs in a day & 48 hrs a week.

claimText: • Permits women to work in all types of units, including night shifts subject to their consent and mandatory safety protocols.
